case_title: JOEL MARTINEZ VS. BLAYNE E. DOUGLAS et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $28.05 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, JOEL
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT DOUGLAS, BLAYNE (OWES COURT FEES) E.

REMOVED FROM DENIED FEE WAIVER PAID CALENDAR. JUDGMENT FILED AS TO THE DEFENDANT ON 8/23/12. DEFENDANT BLAYNE E. DOUGLAS' APPLICATION FOR A FEE WAIVER WAS DENIED ON 9/26/12 AND HE MUST PAY COURT FEES. (206)

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, JOEL AS TO DEFENDANT DOUGLAS, BLAYNE (OWES COURT FEES) E. DOES 1 TO 10, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON SEP-26-2012 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT BLAYNE DOUGLAS' WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION AS TO JURY AND COURT REPORTER FEES -- FOR NON-APPEARANCE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: CYNTHIA MING-MEI LEE; CLERK: J.I. ROQUE/E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
